summary: Full backend + frontend testing for UrgentCall (Expo RN + FastAPI). All 17 backend pytest tests pass against the live preview URL. Frontend mobile flows (splash, login, home, tab navigation Home/Contacts/History/Settings, Add Manually contact, Send Alert contact picker, Settings, Sign Out) all working end-to-end with proper testIDs.

minor.issue: Benign warning at backend startup: 'error reading bcrypt version' (passlib trying to read bcrypt.__about__.__version__). Hashing/verify works correctly - confirmed via login + register tests passing. Cosmetic only.

issues: Bottom tab bar items (Home/Contacts/History/Settings) do NOT expose testID attributes on the tab buttons - had to fall back to text selectors. Recommend adding testID via tabBarButton or screenOptions for more reliable automation.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings (non-blocking) on web preview: 'shadow*' style props deprecated -> use boxShadow; useNativeDriver fallback to JS animation; expo-notifications addPushTokenListener not supported on web. All expected for web preview, no functional impact.

action_items: Optional: add testID to bottom tab bar buttons (tab-home, tab-contacts, tab-history, tab-settings) for more robust automated testing.
Optional: replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow (RN web) to silence console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 537-line file; acceptable for MVP but could be split (auth/contacts/alerts routers) if it grows.
send_push(): silently returns when title/message missing - good non-blocking design.
get_current_user(): falls through to JWT decode if session row missing, then loads user; safe.
MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded (find({'_id': 0}) used consistently).
seed_data_creation: Verified alice@test.com and bob@test.com exist (idempotent _ensure_user fixture creates if missing). Created Bob as a trusted contact under Alice during UI test; test cleanup removes test-created contacts at end of pytest run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_urgentcall_api.py - reuse for regression. Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL env. Tab testIDs absent on bottom nav - use text selectors get_by_text('Contacts', exact=True).first. Sign-out testID is 'settings-logout-button' (not 'signout-button'). Add-contact form testIDs: manual-name-input, manual-phone-input, manual-email-input, search-user-button, save-contact-button.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. Push notification + Google OAuth happy paths intentionally not tested per agent_to_agent_context_note (require real device/Google flow). Their endpoints exist and are reachable; auth/google returns 401 on bad session_token as expected.
